person.name: Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard

nameForms.fullText: Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
"confirmed in 1389 as armourer Børglum Kloster's letter of promise about the holding of a mass for Queen Margrethe and was then written to Aagaard, in 1391 was a co-signer of Otte Strangesen's letter at Øxendrup Tange gård to Mr. Niels Rosenkrantz ("of Ogardh") and was then knighted, mentioned again 1396 (Petrus Nicolai de Agard), co-sealed in 1397 the Kalmar Union, confirmed in 1398 as councilor at King Erik's settlement with the Master of the Order in Prussia (seal), in 1401 Mr. Jens Lykke had all his property in Slet herred, farm Brønnum, Brønnumby, in Næsborg, Salling, Løgsted, Vindblæs and Kornum, as well as in Himmersyssel, 1405 co-lawyers for King Albrecht's peace treaty with the Nordic kingdoms (.. Niclesson von Agarde); witnesses 1406 in King Erik's presence at Aalborg Ting with [brothers] Mr. Erik Nielsen, Bugge Nielsen, Henrik Nielsen and sister Catharine, Mr. Elef Elefsen, as well as [brothers] Jens Eriksen, Niels Eriksen and Brune Erik [Banner] and their mother Susanne as well as Stig Munk on his wife's [Mette Eriksdatter Brunes] behalf of having deeded Queen Margrethe Aastrup (Vennebjerg H.), was still alive in 1409, when he and Mr. Henrik Knudsen were witnesses at Erik Nielsen of Bjæverskov's disposal of Holmegaard to Predbjørn Podebusk.
(S. 8, L. 16) Astrup read Aastrup [ 2 ]"
Source: https://finnholbek.dk/getperson.php?personID=I10097&tree=2

Abstract from https://www.adelsvapen.com/genealogi/Gyllenstierna_af_Svaneholm_nr_29#TAB_3 

Peder Nielsen (son of Niels Erikssen the High, Tab. 1B ). Died about 1409. Risk council. Married to NN Gertsdatter (Ulfstand). Married to Anne Jacobsdatter (Lange).

Children:
Niels Pedersen to Aagaard. Died 1456. See Tab. 3A .
Gert Pedersen, died 1452. Bishop.
Erik Pedersen to Aagaard, died 1425.
Anders Pedersen, died before 1455. Knight, councillor. Moved to England.
Karen Pedersdatter, married to Erik Løvenbalk
Kirsten Pedersdatter, married to Morten Jensen (Gyrstinge)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard於1368年出生在丹麥迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普時，他的父親Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm29歲，母親Christina af Aagaard23歲。他於1407年與Anne Jepsdatter Lange在德國薩辛可萊斯 萊格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在丹麥維波格享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard于1368年出生在丹麦迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普时，他的父亲Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm29岁，母亲Christina af Aagaard23岁。他于1407年与Anne Jepsdatter Lange在德国薩辛可萊斯 萊格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在丹麦維波格享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Nielsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Jorgen, Knud, Lars, Nels, Bent, Borge, Holger, Ove, Einer, Oluf.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Niels, a shortened form of Nikolaus (see Nicholas ). Compare Nielson , Neilsen , Nelsen , Nilsen , and Nilson .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Neilsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Ejnar, Gurli, Jorgen, Nels, Niels.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Nielsen  . Compare   Neilson   3.

variants.name: Nelsen
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as either a patronymic from   Neil   or a metronymic from   Nell .  Use as a given name probably began as a tribute to the British admiral  Lord Nelson  (  1758–1805 ), the victor of the Battle of Trafalgar;  see also  Horatio .  It is, however, now much more common in the United States than in Britain, its popularity there in the 1930s and 40s no doubt having been influenced by the American film actor and singer  Nelson Eddy  (  1901–67 ). Nowadays the name is universally associated with the South African statesman  Nelson Mandela  (  b. 1918 ).

historicEvents.description: The Union of Kalmar unites Denmark, Sweden and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard was born in 1368, in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Denmark, his father, Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, was 29 and his mother, Christina af Aagaard, was 23. He married Anne Jepsdatter Lange in 1407, in Kreis Leipzig, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1410, in Viborg, Denmark, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard est né en 1368, à Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danemark, son père, Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christina af Aagaard, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Jepsdatter Lange en 1407, à Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Viborg, Danemark, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard 1368 in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm 29 und seine Mutter Christina af Aagaard 23. Er hat 1407 in Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Deutschland Anne Jepsdatter Lange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Viborg, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard è nato il nel 1368 nel Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danimarca, il suo padre, Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christina af Aagaard, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Jepsdatter Lange nel 1407, nel Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1410, nel Viborg, Danimarca, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaardが1368年にデンマークスイステドベスター ハンケットルップで生まれた時，父Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholmは29歳，母Christina af Aagaardは23歳であった。1407年にドイツサチセンクレイス レイプズイグでAnne Jepsdatter Langeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年にデンマークヴィボルグで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard(이)가 1368년 덴마크 스이스테드 베스터 핸 케트루프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina af Aagaard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1407년 독일 작센 크레이스 레이p지그에서 Anne Jepsdatter Lange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 덴마크 비볼그에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard nasceu em 1368, em Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca, seu pai, Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Christina af Aagaard, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Jepsdatter Lange em 1407, em Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1410, em Viborg, Dinamarca, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard родился в 1368 г. в местности кеттруп, вестир хань, тистед, Дания, его отцу по имени Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina af Aagaard, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Jepsdatter Lange в 1407 г. в местности крис липзиг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности виборг, Дания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peder Nielsen Gyldenstierne Af Aagaard nació en 1368, en Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca, su papá, Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Christina af Aagaard, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Jepsdatter Lange en 1407, en Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1410, en Viborg, Dinamarca, a la edad de 42 años.
